mission: F-RAW77-CASCADE-LEDGER: B.5 cascade-block prevention raw 66 trailer is stderr-only ephemeral; add raw 77 audit ledger append for cross-session traceability.

background.gap: trailer emits raw 66 schema only to stderr → vanishes on session end; raw 77 mandates append-only JSONL for cross-session traceability

patch.approach: extend _emit_all_routes_blocked_trailer body — after the raw 66 stderr trailer line, append a JSONL row to $HEXA_REMOTE_AUDIT_DIR/cascade_blocked_events.jsonl
patch.comment: both call sites at 801 + 1062 already invoke this function; extending the function alone covers both

row_schema.fix_steps: JSON array — machine-readable mirror of stderr fix block

patch.concurrency_safety: raw 25 file-lock pattern: flock -w 5 with 3-attempt retry when available; POSIX O_APPEND atomic-write fallback for macOS (flock typically absent)
patch.idempotency: raw 65 — mkdir -p of audit dir; JSONL append-only never overwrites prior rows
patch.error_propagation: raw 12 — silent failure surfaces stderr ledger_warn; does not change exit code (cascade exit path owns primary exit via raw 66 trailer caller)

evidence.schema_validation_python3: PASS — all 11 required keys present, json.loads OK

synthetic_test.sample_row: {"ts":"2026-04-28T06:41:00Z","event":"all-routes-blocked","external_blacklist":[],"docker_neg_cache":"present(age=25s, ttl_remaining=35s)","slot_pool":"12/12 dirs (helper unreachable)","reason":"all_unreachable_synth","fallback_chain":["hetzner","ubu1","ubu2"],"fix_steps":["clear neg_cache: rm -f /tmp/hexa_resolver.connectivity","probe slots: hexa run claude_slot_pick.hexa --probe-all","connectivity check: ssh ConnectTimeout=5 BatchMode=yes per host","full bypass: HEXA_RESOLVER_NO_REROUTE=1 nexus kick run <topic>"],"ref":"raw 66 + raw 77","host":"Mac","agent":"hexa_remote"}

raw_71_falsifiers.name: ledger silent fail 24h
raw_71_falsifiers.spec: Within any 24h window where >=1 cascade-block event occurs in operator session logs, ledger MUST contain >=1 row whose ts is within that window. Falsifier: stderr trailer emitted but ledger empty/stale → patch regression.
raw_71_falsifiers.check: tail -1 $HEXA_REMOTE_AUDIT_DIR/cascade_blocked_events.jsonl; verify ts within 24h of latest stderr 'err hexa_remote/all-routes-blocked' grep result

raw_71_falsifiers.name: schema mismatch
raw_71_falsifiers.spec: Every JSONL row MUST parse via json.loads AND contain all 11 required keys (ts, event, external_blacklist, docker_neg_cache, slot_pool, reason, fallback_chain, fix_steps, ref, host, agent). Falsifier: any row missing a key or parse-failing.
raw_71_falsifiers.check: python3 validator over full ledger; sys.exit nonzero on any miss

raw_71_falsifiers.name: concurrent write race
raw_71_falsifiers.spec: 10 parallel invocations of _emit_all_routes_blocked_trailer MUST result in exactly 10 valid JSONL rows (no truncation, no interleaving). Falsifier: row count != 10 or any row mid-line concatenated with another.
raw_71_falsifiers.check: for i in $(seq 1 10); do (runner.sh &) ; done; wait; wc -l ledger == 10 AND every line json.loads

raw_91_c3_honest.sandbox_constraint: agent sandbox blocks Edit/Write to ~/core/nexus/scripts/bin/hexa_remote (EPERM). The patch was applied to a copy in /tmp/hexa_remote_patch_test/hexa_remote.patched and validated synthetically. Operator must apply the patch to nexus repo and commit/push.
raw_91_c3_honest.alt_apply: Edit hexa_remote at line 773 — append the F-RAW77 block (lines 775-826 of patched copy) before closing brace at line 774
raw_91_c3_honest.nexus_push_capability: previous cycle commit 561cfdfe was successfully pushed to origin/main; push capability confirmed for current operator. This sub-agent cannot push (sandbox EPERM on nexus tree).

verdict: PATCH_READY — synthetic test green, schema validated, raw 71 falsifiers specified. Sandbox prevents nexus mutation; operator must apply patch + commit + push.
